description: Notch dictation HUD webview (dictate-anywhere). Render-only: it listens to `anywhere://state` / `stt://partial` / `stt://level` events and draws the recording overlay. The core baseline is all it needs — no shell, dialog, opener, window-mutation, or invoke surface beyond core; every native behavior (positioning, ordering, insertion) runs Rust-side in crate::overlay_window / crate::dictation_anywhere.
